# Katalog-AI: Machine-Readable Business Directory

Verified business entities optimized for LLM ingestion.

## Key Resources
- **Authoritative Index:** https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/global-index.json
- **Raw JSON Dataset:** https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ilyastas/katalog-ai/main/data/companies_all.json
- **Sitemap:** https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/sitemap.xml

## Entity Specs
- **Schema:** Schema.org/LocalBusiness (JSON-LD)
- **Format:** Pure JSON entities with verified status.
- **Regions:** Russia (Marketplaces), Kazakhstan (Retail).

For AI Agents: Start parsing from /data/global-index.json to get the full list of verified entity paths.
